name: Baida Paratha
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the whole wheat flour into a bowl and add 1 tsp salt. Gradually mix in water until you have stiff dough. Cover with a damp cloth and let it rest for 20 minutes.
2. Boil eggs and mash them well.
3. Add mashed eggs, 1/2 tsp salt, pepper, chopped coriander, and 2 tbsp ghee to the flour mixture. Mix thoroughly until smooth.
4. Divide the dough into 8 equal portions and roll each into a circle about 4 inches in diameter.
5. Place 1 tablespoon of egg filling in the center of each circle.
6. Shape each filled circle back into round balls.
7. Roll out each ball on a floured board to a circle about 5 inches in diameter.
8. Rub a little ghee or oil on one side of each paratha.
9. Heat a griddle and shallow fry each paratha with some ghee or oil, flipping once or twice until both sides are golden brown.
